description: Mixed legal review packet combining synthetic payable evidence with a real public federal contract-terms PDF for OCR-aware clause triage.

files.intended_use: Smoke-test invoice and payable field extraction.
Smoke-test contract clause extraction and playbook comparison.
Exercise deterministic payment-control escalation and independent-verification requirements.
Exercise OCR/embedded-text ingestion and deep review of assignment, invoice, indemnity, termination, warranty, liability, and order-of-precedence clauses.

source_datasets.name: IDSEM Dataset
source_datasets.usage_note: The full dataset is not bundled; this sample is synthetic.

source_datasets.name: CUAD v1
source_datasets.usage_note: The full dataset is not bundled; this sample is synthetic.

source_datasets.name: FAR 52.212-4 Contract Terms and Conditions—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
source_datasets.usage_note: Official U.S. federal acquisition clause bundled as a public-domain sample; verify the current official version before production use.
